selection_note: Accepted as the sole retained date for Level II; useful for local sequence and human-presence subset, but cultural attribution remains UP-indet so it is excluded from the cultural subset.
Accepted key ABOx-SC charcoal date for Level IIa; robust anchor of the Late Aurignacian phase.
Accepted Level IIa determination; coherent with the Late Aurignacian package and useful for human-presence and cultural subsets.
Accepted Level IIa determination; coherent with the Late Aurignacian package and useful for human-presence and cultural subsets.
Accepted OSL below IIb; retained as an indirect lower bracket for the last Middle Palaeolithic horizon, but not selected for human-presence or cultural subsets.
Accepted OSL from the top of III.2; useful indirect constraint on the Middle Palaeolithic archaeological package III.1-III.2.
Accepted OSL from the base of III.2; useful indirect constraint on the Middle Palaeolithic archaeological package III.1-III.2.
Accepted OSL for III.3/IIIa; useful indirect constraint on a Middle Palaeolithic archaeological unit.
Accepted OSL for IV.3; useful indirect constraint on a Middle Palaeolithic archaeological unit.
Accepted OSL for V; useful indirect constraint on a Middle Palaeolithic archaeological unit, with caution because the deep unit is anchored by a single OSL.
